details: The scheme "Atma Nirbhar Pashu Palan Yojna (ANPPY)", implemented by the Department of Animal Husbandry, Veterinary & Dairy Development, Government of Arunachal Pradesh, aims to enhance rural livelihoods, promote sustainable animal husbandry practices, and contribute to self-reliance in the livestock sector. Under this scheme, financial assistance in the form of credit-linked support is provided to unemployed individuals, Self-Help Groups (SHGs), farmers' clubs, cooperative societies, and Dairy Cooperative Societies (DCS) for livestock rearing and allied activities.
benefits: Under this scheme, financial assistance in the form of credit-linked support is provided to eligible beneficiaries for livestock rearing and allied activities.
eligibility: The following beneficiaries are eligible under this scheme:

Arunachal State Rural Livelihoods Mission (ArSRLM) promoted Self-Help Groups (SHGs), individuals, Farmers' Clubs, Registered Cooperative Societies, and Dairy Cooperative Societies (DCS) will be eligible.
Individuals should belong to the Arunachal Pradesh Scheduled Tribe (APST) category and be unemployed.

documents_required: Photocopy of 1st page of Bank Passbook

faqs.question: Who can apply for ANPPY?
faqs.answer: Unemployed APST individuals, SHGs, farmers clubs, and registered cooperative societies can apply.

faqs.question: What are the eligible livestock units under the scheme?
faqs.answer: Dairy, poultry, and piggery units are eligible.

faqs.question: Is the scheme loan-based?
faqs.answer: Yes, ANPPY is a credit-linked scheme requiring bank loan sanction.

faqs.question: Do SHGs need to be registered to apply?
faqs.answer: Yes, SHGs must be promoted by ArSRLM and properly registered.

faqs.question: What documents are needed to apply?
faqs.answer: Documents include Aadhaar, APST certificate, unemployment proof, and a project proposal.

faqs.question: How soon will I get the subsidy?
faqs.answer: Subsidy is released post-loan sanction and verification by the department.

faqs.question: Will training or support be provided?
faqs.answer: Yes, technical support and guidance will be provided by the implementing agency.

faqs.question: Can existing livestock businesses apply?
faqs.answer: No, the scheme is intended for new, unemployed applicants only.

faqs.question: Where can I apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Applicant can apply at the Atma Nirbhar Yojana portal .
